title: light assist tool
body:
# Introduction  
This mod adds a non-placeable torch, which can be crafted using the stonecutter. It is designed to address the issue of accidentally placing torches when using dynamic lighting with shaders enabled.

# 介绍
目前添加了一个不可放置的火把，可以吧火把放在切石机里面制作，主要是应对开光影带移动光源时容易误放而制作的。
